_comment: Committed defaults only — no personal paths. Copy reconstruct.config.example.json to reconstruct.config.local.json for local overrides (gitignored).

ask._comment: Interactive `gpt ask` synthesis. Smaller num_ctx than the summariser (ask only feeds k retrieved excerpts). budget_s is the everyday wall-clock cap (>15 so a routed cloud engine can finish); the 15s interactive target is the architecture design driver — prove it with `gpt ask --budget 15` on the best route. budget 0 disables the abort. engine is the warm daemon's plan-authenticated CLI (claude|codex).
